dependency_security_status: npm audit issues triaged for alpha; remediation plan documented

checks.name: check_node_policy
checks.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; "[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]/backend/.venv/bin/python" scripts/check_node_policy.py --root "[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]"

checks.name: frontend_node_gate
checks.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; "[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]/backend/.venv/bin/python" scripts/check_frontend_node_gate.py --expected-major 22

checks.name: frontend_install
checks.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; npm ci --prefix frontend

checks.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; npm run lint --prefix frontend

checks.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; npm run test:contracts --prefix frontend

checks.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; npm run build --prefix frontend

known_limitations: alpha gate only; not a production release gate
AI outputs are reviewer assistance only — not determinations of guilt or legal conclusions
external HTTP fetch results are not guaranteed current; system operates on cached snapshots
no real-time alerting; proof artifacts must be regenerated manually after each code change
